title: Design irrigation system maintenance and monitoring programs
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design irrigation system maintenance and monitoring programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Design an irrigation system maintenance program

pcs.text: Specify resources needed to perform maintenance tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify resources needed to perform maintenance tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify resources needed to perform maintenance tasks.

pcs.text: Specify repairs, replacements and servicing requirements for equipment and machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify repairs, replacements and servicing requirements for equipment and machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify repairs, replacements and servicing requirements for equipment and machinery.

pcs.text: Specify activities required to maintain the irrigation site, system hardware and water quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify activities required to maintain the irrigation site, system hardware and water quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify activities required to maintain the irrigation site, system hardware and water quality.

pcs.text: Analyse manufacturer operating manuals and use as guidance to specify maintenance activities, schedule and skills required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse manufacturer operating manuals and use as guidance to specify maintenance activities, schedule and skills required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse manufacturer operating manuals and use as guidance to specify maintenance activities, schedule and skills required.

pcs.text: Take into account water supply authority constraints and requirements for water and maintenance when scheduling system maintenance program activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take into account water supply authority constraints and requirements for water and maintenance when scheduling system maintenance program activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take into account water supply authority constraints and requirements for water and maintenance when scheduling system maintenance program activities.

pcs.text: Determine labour and workplace health and safety requirements for each activity and record
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine labour and workplace health and safety requirements for each activity and record?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine labour and workplace health and safety requirements for each activity and record.

pcs.text: Ensure weed control, water storage and treatment maintenance form an integral part of the system maintenance program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure weed control, water storage and treatment maintenance form an integral part of the system maintenance program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure weed control, water storage and treatment maintenance form an integral part of the system maintenance program.

pcs.text: Specify strategies for dealing with and minimising environmental impacts and maximising positive impacts of irrigation, drainage and water treatment systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Specify strategies for dealing with and minimising environmental impacts and maximising positive impacts of irrigation, drainage and water treatment systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Specify strategies for dealing with and minimising environmental impacts and maximising positive impacts of irrigation, drainage and water treatment systems.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document irrigation system maintenance program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document irrigation system maintenance program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Design an irrigation system maintenance program

elements.title: Design a monitoring and scheduling program

pcs.text: Integrate procedures for monitoring and recording system hardware use and performance into the monitoring and scheduling program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Integrate procedures for monitoring and recording system hardware use and performance into the monitoring and scheduling program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Integrate procedures for monitoring and recording system hardware use and performance into the monitoring and scheduling program.

pcs.text: Integrate procedures for scheduling, monitoring and recording water use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Integrate procedures for scheduling, monitoring and recording water use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Integrate procedures for scheduling, monitoring and recording water use.

pcs.text: Develop procedures for monitoring and recording operating costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop procedures for monitoring and recording operating costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop procedures for monitoring and recording operating costs.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop water restriction contingency plans?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop water restriction contingency plans.

pcs.text: Document irrigation system monitoring and scheduling program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document irrigation system monitoring and scheduling program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document irrigation system monitoring and scheduling program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Design a monitoring and scheduling program
